category_sources: Official README describes bashate as an automated style checker for bash scripts.
source_facts.description says bashate enforces code style for bash programs.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use `bashate`.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub mirror with README documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README states that the source is maintained at `https://opendev.org/openstack/bashate/`.
source_facts.homepage points to the OpenStack GitHub mirror, which identifies the canonical OpenDev source.
tags_sources: Official README says bashate is a pep8-equivalent automated style checker for bash scripts in OpenStack.
